description:
The release-plz.yml workflow sets 'command: release-plz' on the release-plz/action@v0.5 step. The valid values for that input are empty (run both release-pr and release), 'release-pr', or 'release'. 'release-plz' matches neither condition in the action's shell script, so both release-pr and release branches are skipped — the action prints 'Using forge github' and exits without ever running release-plz. Result: every release-plz workflow run completes 'successfully' in 15s but never opens a PR, tags, or publishes.

Fix: remove the 'command: release-plz' line from .github/workflows/release-plz.yml. Let it default to empty so the action runs both release-pr and release. Verify by inspecting the next release-plz run log — it should print '-- Running release-plz release-pr --' followed by JSON output, and open a PR bumping Cargo.toml + regenerating CHANGELOG.md.
title: release-plz workflow: drop invalid command input
